hooks.command: FAILS=$(gh run list --limit 8 --json status,conclusion,name,workflowName 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; runs=json.load(sys.stdin); fails=[r for r in runs if r.get('conclusion')=='failure']; print(f'CI/CD WARNING: {len(fails)} failed workflow(s): ' + ', '.join(set(r['workflowName'] for r in fails))) if fails else None" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FAILS" ] && echo "{\"message\": \"$FAILS. Check with: gh run list --limit 5\"}" || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in cd\ *|cd\"*|cd\/*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Do not use cd prefix. The working directory is already the project root. Run commands directly."}'; exit 0;; *) exit 0;; esac; }
